description_for_human: Access Azure DevOps work items, pipelines, repositories, pull requests, test plans, search, and wiki through natural language.
description_for_model: Tools provided by the Microsoft-hosted Azure DevOps MCP server at mcp.dev.azure.com. Supports work item management (create, read, update, link), board and backlog queries, sprint and capacity management, pipeline monitoring and triggering, repository browsing and commit history, pull request review and threading, test plan and test case management, cross-project code and wiki search, and wiki page editing.

tools.name: core_list_projects
tools.description: List all Azure DevOps projects in the organisation.

tools.name: wit_get_work_item
tools.description: Get a work item by ID including fields, relations and comments.

tools.name: wit_create_work_item
tools.description: Create a new work item (Bug, Task, User Story, Epic, Feature, etc.).

tools.name: wit_update_work_item
tools.description: Update fields on an existing work item.

tools.name: wit_query_work_items
tools.description: Run a WIQL query and return matching work items.

tools.name: wit_list_work_item_types
tools.description: List available work item types in a project.

tools.name: boards_get_backlog
tools.description: Get backlog items for a team and backlog level.

tools.name: boards_get_board
tools.description: Get the Kanban board for a team.

tools.name: work_list_iterations
tools.description: List sprint iterations for a team.

tools.name: work_get_capacity
tools.description: Get capacity and days-off for a team sprint.

tools.name: pipelines_list
tools.description: List pipelines in a project.

tools.name: pipelines_get
tools.description: Get pipeline definition and recent run status.

tools.name: pipelines_run
tools.description: Trigger a pipeline run with optional parameters and branch.

tools.name: pipelines_get_run
tools.description: Get status and logs for a specific pipeline run.

tools.name: repos_list
tools.description: List Git repositories in a project.

tools.name: repos_get_item
tools.description: Get file or folder content from a repository.

tools.name: repos_get_commits
tools.description: Get commit history for a repository or branch.

tools.name: git_list_pull_requests
tools.description: List pull requests with optional status and reviewer filters.

tools.name: git_get_pull_request
tools.description: Get pull request details including threads and reviewers.

tools.name: git_create_pull_request
tools.description: Create a new pull request.

tools.name: git_update_pull_request
tools.description: Update pull request status, reviewers or description.

tools.name: test_list_test_plans
tools.description: List test plans in a project.

tools.name: test_get_test_suites
tools.description: Get test suites within a test plan.

tools.name: test_get_test_cases
tools.description: Get test cases in a suite.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for code across repositories in the organisation.

tools.name: search_work_items
tools.description: Full-text search across work items.

tools.name: wiki_get_page
tools.description: Get a wiki page by path.

tools.name: wiki_update_page
tools.description: Create or update a wiki page.
